text.title: selling-ideas Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for selling-ideas as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Leading with the solution before establishing the problem.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Audiences who do not yet feel the pain perceive solutions as unnecessary complexity. Pain must be established first.

failure-mode.description: Asking "Does that make sense?" after presenting.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Invites a yes/no response that shuts down dialogue. Use "What questions do you have?" instead.

failure-mode.description: Using weak modal verbs: "I think we should...", "Maybe we could..."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Modality signals uncertainty, which undermines the recommendation. Use "I recommend..." and "Here's the plan..."
